---
title: "About"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="editorial-page">
  <div class="editorial-page-head">
    <div class="editorial-page-index">/ABOUT</div>
    <h1>About Me</h1>
  </div>

  <section class="editorial-block editorial-two-col">
    <div class="editorial-text">
      <p class="editorial-intro">
        I am a final-year Business Studies student with growing interests in business analysis, marketing strategy, process improvement, and professional communication.
      </p>
      <p>
        My academic work has helped me develop a stronger understanding of how analytical thinking, structured problem solving, and clear communication contribute to business decision-making.
      </p>
      <p>
        Through this ePortfolio, I present my coursework, technical learning, certificates, and reflection in a more professional and organised way.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="editorial-media">
      <img src="images/about-1.jpg" alt="About photo">
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="editorial-block">
    <div class="editorial-subhead">
      <div class="editorial-mini-index">01</div>
      <h2>Academic Direction</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="editorial-body-copy">
      <p>
        My studies have strengthened my understanding of business operations, data interpretation, and organisational improvement. I am especially interested in applying academic knowledge to practical business contexts.
      </p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="editorial-grid editorial-grid-three">
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Business Analysis</h3>
      <p>Using structured thinking and evidence-based reasoning to understand business problems and opportunities.</p>
    </article>
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Marketing Strategy</h3>
      <p>Exploring how communication, customer understanding, and planning contribute to effective brand and market positioning.</p>
    </article>
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Professional Growth</h3>
      <p>Developing communication, technical, and presentation skills through coursework, certifications, and portfolio development.</p>
    </article>
  </section>
</section>
```
